rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions underTax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.157 governs campaign contribution limits for judicial candidates. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 253.157. LIMIT ON CONTRIBUTION BY GENERAL-PURPOSE COMMITTEES.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and judicial campaign contribution limits.
